subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath manifested His Cause as He willeth and created all beings through a word from His presence. He, verily, is the All-Powerful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی اظهر امره کیف اراد و خلق الخلق بکلمه من عنده انه لهو المقتدر
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @suffering and imprisonment, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @mission of the Manifestation of God in the world
